name: Executive Dashboard Q1 2024 Initiative
description: Strategic project delivering enhanced reporting capabilities and performance optimization for executive visibility into project health and team velocity.

milestones.name: Phase 1: Discovery & Design
milestones.description: Stakeholder interviews, requirements gathering, and design mockups complete

milestones.name: Phase 2: Core Development
milestones.description: Backend services and primary component development in progress

milestones.name: Phase 2b: Performance Optimization
milestones.description: Performance benchmarking at risk due to infrastructure delays; may impact Phase 3 timeline

milestones.name: Phase 3: Integration & Testing
milestones.description: System integration and comprehensive testing planned

workItems.title: API Integration Layer Complete
workItems.description: Successfully integrated third-party data source API with full authentication and error handling. 100+ hours of development and testing completed.

workItems.title: Database Schema Optimization
workItems.description: Redesigned database schema to improve query performance by 40%. Implemented indexing strategy and query optimization for large datasets.

workItems.title: User Authentication System
workItems.description: Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication with JWT token support. Includes session management and refresh token rotation for security.

workItems.title: Dashboard UI Components
workItems.description: Building responsive React components for metrics display, timeline visualization, and work item tracking. Currently 75% complete with responsive CSS.

workItems.title: Performance Testing & Optimization
workItems.description: Conducting load testing and optimizing API endpoints for sub-1-second response times. Profiling and caching implementation in progress.

workItems.title: Mobile App Responsive Design
workItems.description: Adapting dashboard for mobile and tablet devices. Design approved but implementation delayed pending UI component completion.

workItems.title: Executive Report Generation
workItems.description: Feature to export dashboard snapshots as PDF reports for stakeholder presentations. Originally planned for Phase 2 but deferred to Phase 3.

workItems.title: Documentation and Training
workItems.description: Creating comprehensive user documentation, API reference guides, and conducting team training sessions. Scheduled for Phase 3.

workItems.title: Real-Time Notifications
workItems.description: Implementing WebSocket-based real-time notifications for dashboard updates and alerts. Planning to begin in next sprint.

workItems.title: Security Audit & Compliance
workItems.description: Scheduling third-party security audit and implementing compliance checks. Expected to start in Phase 3 timeline.
